ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_mapping" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_implementations" (
  "implementation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game implementation */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the game implementation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game implementation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the implementation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the implementation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("implementation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game version */,
  "implementation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the game implementation */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the game implementation */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the game version */,
  "player" TEXT /* Name of the game implementation being evaluated */,
  "score_of_abapro_reimplementation" INTEGER /* Score achieved by AbaPro Reimplementation */,
  "score_of_papadopoulos_reimplementation" INTEGER /* Score achieved by Papadopoulos Reimplementation */,
  "time_spent" INTEGER /* Total time spent in milliseconds */,
  "nodes_visited" INTEGER /* Total nodes visited during gameplay */,
  "leaf_nodes" INTEGER /* Total leaf nodes encountered */,
  "rating_of_game_state" INTEGER /* Rating of the current game state */,
  "depth" INTEGER /* Depth of the game tree */,
  "exact_cuts" INTEGER /* Exact cuts made in the gameplay */,
  "window_cuts" INTEGER /* Window cuts made during gameplay */,
  "windows_narrowed" INTEGER /* Windows narrowed during gameplay */,
  "transposition_table_size" INTEGER /* Size of the transposition table in bytes */,
  "branching_factor_depth_1" INTEGER /* Branching factor at depth 1 */,
  "branching_factor_depth_2" INTEGER /* Branching factor at depth 2 */,
  "branching_factor_depth_3" INTEGER /* Branching factor at depth 3 */,
  "branching_factor_depth_4" INTEGER /* Branching factor at depth 4 */,
  "memory_usage" INTEGER /* Memory usage in bytes */,
  "cpu_usage" INTEGER /* CPU usage in percentage */,
  "network_latency" INTEGER /* Network latency in milliseconds */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the test was run */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test was run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game state */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the metric entry */,
  "state_description" TEXT /* Description of the game state */,
  "state_data" TEXT /* Detailed data about the game state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game state was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytic_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data and visualizations of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_metrics" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the metric entry */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the metric used in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was added to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id", "metric_id")
)
